invariants: Forsetti is the sealed runtime framework.
Applications and modules are built inside Forsetti through public contracts.
Every module must include a Forsetti JSON manifest.
Modules must not share code directly.
Modules must not share data directly.
Modules must not know other module classes, functions, methods, operators, or databases.
All module I/O requirements must be declared in the manifest.
Runtime activation must fail if manifest, entitlement, compatibility, capability, or I/O validation fails.
All intermodule interaction must go through Forsetti orchestration contracts.
Default modules are still modules and must obey manifest, entitlement, and isolation rules.
